film.title: Atlantis: The Lost Empire
film.overview: A young linguist named Milo Thatch joins an intrepid group of explorers to find the mysterious lost continent of Atlantis.

dialogues.dialogue: Tired, Mr. Thatch?  Hyah!  Aw, that's a darn shame... because I'm just getting warmed up.  because I'm just getting warmed up.  Aah!

to open up that second garage after all.  And, Vinny, you can start a whole chain of flower shops.  I'm sure your family's going to be very proud.  But that's what it's all about, right?  Money.

dialogues.dialogue: We're this close to our biggest payday ever... and you pick now of all times to grow a conscience.  and you pick now of all times to grow a conscience.  We've done a lot of things we're not proud of... robbing graves, plundering tombs... double parking... but nobody got hurt.  but nobody got hurt.  Well, maybe somebody got hurt... but nobody we knew.
